zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Alice Bohun於1490年出生在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德時，她的父親Richard Bohun45歲，母親Elizabeth Harvey40歲。她於1503年4月29日與Sir James Barber在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1579年1月30日在英國英格蘭素福爾可福雷辛費爾德享年89歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可福雷辛費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Alice Bohun于1490年出生在英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德时，她的父亲Richard Bohun45岁，母亲Elizabeth Harvey40岁。她于1503年4月29日与Sir James Barber在英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1579年1月30日在英国英格兰素福爾可福雷辛費爾德享年89岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可福雷辛費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Bohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Alice Bohun was born in 1490, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, her father, Richard Bohun, was 45 and her mother, Elizabeth Harvey, was 40. She married Sir James Barber on 29 April 1503, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 30 January 1579, in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89, and was buried in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Alice Bohun est née en 1490, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Richard Bohun, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Harvey, avait 40 ans. Elle a épousé Sir James Barber le 29 avril 1503, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1579, à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Fressingfield, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Alice Bohun 1490 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Bohun 45 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Harvey 40. Sie hat am 29. April 1503 in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England Sir James Barber geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Januar 1579 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Fressingfield, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Bohun è nata il nel 1490 nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Richard Bohun, aveva 45 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Harvey, aveva 40 anni. Lei sposato Sir James Barber il 29 aprile 1503, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 30 gennaio 1579, nel Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Fressingfield, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Bohunが1490年にイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで生まれた時，父Richard Bohunは45歳，母Elizabeth Harveyは40歳であった。1503年4月29日にイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドでSir James Barberと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1579年1月30日にイギリスイギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドで89歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクフレシングフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Alice Bohun(이)가 1490년 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Bohun(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Harvey(은)는 40세였다. 그녀는 1503년 4월 29일 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에서 Sir James Barber(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1579년 1월 30일 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 프레징필드에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 프레징필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Alice Bohun nasceu em 1490, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Bohun, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Harvey, tinha 40 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir James Barber em 29 de abril de 1503, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1579, em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Alice Bohun родилась в 1490 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Bohun было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Harvey, 40. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir James Barber 29 апреля 1503 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 30 января 1579 г. в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности фрессингфиелд, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Alice Bohun nació en 1490, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Bohun, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Harvey, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Sir James Barber el 29 de abril de 1503, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 30 de enero de 1579, en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Fressingfield, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
